acceptance.proof: The preserved crate-private helper completes exact bounded reads/writes and retains typed cancellation, deadline, truncation, and I/O outcomes without format or activation authority.
Changed source hashes, project-relative descriptor paths, next resolver-owned lock revision/fingerprint, Rust binding, and activation fixture agree exactly.
Accepted Float32 and fixed-width initialization, sample bytes, timestamps, values, errors, activation capabilities, and cleanup remain unchanged.
LSLC-003E remains blocked evidence; no public facade, format, chunk, dependency, device, adapter, ambient activation, official-source, or Manifold authority is added.

commit_policy: Commit the corrective proposal and lifecycle separately, then one dependency-closed helper/descriptor/lock/binding family, validation, acceptance, and push preparation; preserve LSLC-003E blocked history and all failures.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the dependency-closed private helper extraction, corrective history, and nonclaims.
Describe facade-preserving reuse and the exact lock correction.
Record helper ownership, dependency direction, descriptor provenance, and retained facade authority.
Route exact-byte, damaged-path, lock-binding, history, and facade-parity checks.
Review blocked-unit recovery, lane, and public-boundary impact; current guidance covers the corrective unit.
Review facade-preserving extraction, artifact separation, and closed activation; current guidance covers it.

non_scope: Handshake header/framing extraction, public API changes, runtime behavior changes, String, Int64, chunks, multiple samples/channels, discovery, clocks, queues, recovery, or adapters.
Dependencies, unsafe/FFI, devices, official implementation source, private evidence, ambient activation, crate splitting, or Manifold authority.
Rewriting or relabeling LSLC-003E blocked history as accepted evidence.
objective: Correct the blocked LSLC-003E extraction by retaining its crate-private bounded exact-record helper and facade delegation while closing every changed feature descriptor, resolver-owned lock, exact activation fingerprint, instruction, validation, and lifecycle binding required for an accepted dependency-closed tree.
outputs: The preserved crate-private exact-length TCP record helper and Float32/fixed-width delegation remain facade- and behavior-preserving with typed error parity.
Only the two changed feature descriptors receive current source revision/hash bindings; the owner resolver emits the next portable lock revision and LSLC-003C exact fingerprint bindings follow it.
Focused valid/damaged parity, owner, workflow, public-boundary, instruction, and lifecycle evidence preserves LSLC-003E as blocked history and accepts only the dependency-closed corrective tree.
